overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek riding a camel through an ancient Egyptian city. The clip begins at a waterfront promenade with towering obelisks, passes a monumental temple adorned with hieroglyphics, and continues through sun-drenched city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with canal and twin obelisks

events.description: eagle takes flight from character's arm and soars upward into the sky
camel begins walking forward along the stone promenade

agents.ego_description: sitting on camel by the canal, releasing eagle into the air, then proceeding forward along the waterfront

notable_agents.action: eagle taking flight from rider's arm and soaring skyward
child standing near the water's edge watching the camel

entered.detail: calm water with lily pads running between stone walkways
two tall dark stone obelisks with gold tips flanking the path ahead
tall date palms lining the waterfront promenade
white stone buildings with columns and red tile roofs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit waterfront promenade with a canal running through the center. The character sits on a camel between two towering obelisks while an eagle takes flight from his arm. The camel then proceeds forward along the stone walkway, passing palm trees and classical buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple complex with hieroglyphic walls

events.description: riding from waterfront promenade into the temple complex area with monumental architecture

agents.ego_description: riding camel along the temple perimeter, passing by the hieroglyphic-covered walls and giant statues

notable_agents.action: pedestrian ascending the temple stairs toward the entrance

entered.detail: massive stone wall covered in colorful hieroglyphics and reliefs
detailed Egyptian carvings and paintings covering the temple exterior
large dark statues of pharaohs flanking the temple entrance
large bronze bowls on stone stands for burning offerings

segments.scene_description: The camel rides past a monumental temple complex adorned with hieroglyphics and giant pharaoh statues. The camera pans to reveal the grand entrance as the character moves along the temple wall, with palm trees now visible on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dusty commercial street with hanging fabric banners

events.description: turning from temple area into a shaded street lined with hanging white banners
dust particles become visible floating in the sunbeams through the banners

agents.ego_description: navigating camel through the narrow street, passing pedestrians and children playing

notable_agents.action: child running alongside the camel briefly before stopping

entered.detail: white fabric hangings strung across the street creating shade
two-story houses with balconies and potted plants
hazy sunlight filtering through airborne dust particles

segments.scene_description: Leaving the temple behind, the character rides into a narrow city street decorated with hanging white banners. The atmosphere is dusty with sunbeams filtering through the fabric. Residential buildings line the left side while pedestrians and children move through the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city gate approach with open plaza

events.description: emerging from the narrow street into a more open plaza area approaching the city gate

agents.ego_description: riding through the open plaza toward the large stone city gate

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with fortified walls
hazy mountains visible beyond the city walls

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider plaza as the character approaches a large stone city gate. The dust clears revealing distant mountains beyond the walls. Residential buildings remain on the left while the path leads directly toward the fortified entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand waterfront promenade through a monumental temple complex and into the dusty heart of an ancient city. It begins on a sunlit stone walkway between two towering obelisks as an eagle takes flight, with the camel proceeding forward past palm trees and classical buildings. As the path continues, the scene expands to reveal a monumental temple adorned with hieroglyphics and giant pharaoh statues before the camera pans along the temple wall. The environment then shifts into a narrow city street where sunbeams filter through hanging white banners and pedestrians move past residential buildings. Finally, the dusty street opens into a wide plaza, leading the character toward a large stone city gate with distant mountains visible beyond the walls.
